summary: Iteration 18: Tested peek effect, auto-scroll for mobile carousels, object storage integration, and section visibility. Fixed frontend compilation error in SaunaAdvantages.jsx (duplicate scrollRef declaration). Backend: 18/18 tests pass. Frontend: Mobile carousels working with peek effect and auto-scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SaunaAdvantages.jsx had duplicate scrollRef declaration (line 58 and line 73) causing compilation error. Removed the useRef declaration and moved useAutoScroll hook before the early return.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 18 features working: 1) Mobile carousels have peek effect (min-w-[72%] or min-w-[78%]) showing neighboring card edges. 2) Auto-scroll works on all 4 mobile carousels (SpecialOffer, Advantages, VideoReviews, Reviews) - verified dot indicator changed after 5 seconds. 3) Dot indicators present on all carousels. 4) Touch interaction pauses auto-scroll (implemented via onTouchStart/onTouchEnd handlers). 5) Object storage working - images and videos served from cloud storage (tested with valid IDs from database). 6) Section visibility API returns both sauna and balia sections. 7) Admin panel has visibility controls under САУНЫ -> Видимость and КУПЕЛИ -> Контент -> Видимость tab.

peek_effect.details: Mobile carousel cards use min-w-[72%] (SpecialOffer, Advantages, VideoReviews) or min-w-[78%] (Reviews) so neighboring card edges are visible

auto_scroll.details: Auto-scroll works on mobile carousels - verified dot indicator changed from position 2 to position 3 after 5 seconds wait

dot_indicators.details: All 4 mobile carousels have dot indicators showing current position

touch_pause.details: Touch handlers (onTouchStart/onTouchEnd) implemented in useAutoScroll hook to pause auto-scroll temporarily

object_storage_images.details: GET /api/images/{id} returns image from object storage (tested with 766ad821-8fc0-4b26-b5e6-d94760517273)

object_storage_videos.details: GET /api/videos/{filename} returns video from object storage (tested with 6e6e374a-4c86-45e5-af76-1e767755af26.mp4)

upload_endpoints.details: POST /api/admin/upload-image and POST /api/admin/upload-video endpoints exist and require authentication

section_visibility_api.details: GET /api/settings/visibility returns both sauna and balia sections

admin_visibility.details: Admin panel has visibility controls: САУНЫ -> Видимость shows section toggles for Desktop/Mobile. КУПЕЛИ -> Контент -> Видимость tab exists.

hero_backgrounds.details: /sauny Hero loads with background image. resolveMediaUrl helper correctly handles relative URLs.

frontend_compilation.details: Frontend compiles without errors after fixing SaunaAdvantages.jsx duplicate scrollRef issue

bug_fix_applied.issue: Duplicate scrollRef declaration - line 58 had 'const scrollRef = useRef(null)' and line 73 tried to destructure scrollRef from useAutoScroll
bug_fix_applied.fix: Removed the useRef declaration on line 58 and moved useAutoScroll hook call before the early return (if !data return null), using data?.items?.length for itemCount
